next_tasks.title: Add --plan-file support
next_tasks.description: Allow reading pre-captured terraform plan JSON from a file instead of always executing terraform plan -json live.
details: When provided, skip Command::new("terraform") and read file directly
File contains NDJSON output from terraform plan -json
Pass file contents to existing parse_plan_output()
Add test with sample plan file fixture
next_tasks.prompt: Work on branch feature/plan-file-support and open a PR to main. In src/main.rs, add a --plan-file <PATH> CLI argument to clap::Parser. When provided, skip the terraform execution and read the file directly into a String, then pass it to parse_plan_output(). Add a test with a sample plan file fixture. Keep all existing functionality intact. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

next_tasks.title: Add resource filtering
next_tasks.description: Filter parsed resource changes by type pattern or action before rendering.
details: Use glob crate for pattern matching
next_tasks.prompt: Work on branch feature/filtering and open a PR to main. In src/main.rs, add --include-type <PATTERN> and --exclude-action <ACTION> to the clap::Parser struct. After parse_plan_output(), filter the Vec<ResourceChange>: --include-type keeps only resources matching a glob pattern (e.g., aws_*), --exclude-action drops resources with matching actions (e.g., read). Both should support comma-separated values. Use the glob crate for pattern matching. Add tests for filtering logic. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

next_tasks.title: Add verbose/logging mode
next_tasks.description: Replace println!/eprintln! with tracing crate for configurable log levels.
details: Add tracing-subscriber for console output formatting
next_tasks.prompt: Work on branch feature/logging and open a PR to main. In src/main.rs, add --verbose / -v to the clap::Parser. Replace all println!/eprintln! with the tracing crate: tracing::info! for normal output, tracing::warn! for skipped JSON lines, tracing::error! for terraform execution failures. Without --verbose, only show the final summary (suppress terraform stderr unless error). Add tracing-subscriber for console output formatting. Add tests verifying log levels. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

next_tasks.title: Add --dry-run mode
next_tasks.description: Print what terraform plan command would be executed without actually running it.
details: Print resolved directory path and terraform command that would run
Do not execute terraform or parse output
next_tasks.prompt: Work on branch feature/dry-run and open a PR to main. In src/main.rs, add --dry-run flag to clap::Parser. When set, print what terraform plan command would be executed and what the output format will be, but do not actually run Terraform. Useful for debugging CLI arguments and path resolution. Add a test verifying dry-run output. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

next_tasks.title: Add configuration file support
next_tasks.description: Support .terraform-plan-parser.toml for persistent defaults and filters.
details: CLI arguments override config file values
Add tests for config loading and CLI override behavior
next_tasks.prompt: Work on branch feature/config-file and open a PR to main. Add support for a .terraform-plan-parser.toml configuration file in the target directory. The file should allow setting default values for format, no_emoji, and exclude_action. CLI arguments should override config file values. Use the toml crate for parsing. Add tests for config loading and CLI override behavior. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

next_tasks.title: Add daily CI workflow
next_tasks.description: GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests once daily plus manual trigger.
details: Do NOT trigger on push or pull_request
Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy
Add CI status badge to README.md
next_tasks.prompt: Work on a new feature branch called feature/add-ci-cd and open a PR to main. Add a GitHub Actions workflow at .github/workflows/daily-ci.yml. Run on a schedule: once daily at 08:00 UTC (cron: '0 8 * * *'). Also allow manual trigger (workflow_dispatch). Do NOT trigger on push or pull_request. Run on ubuntu-latest. Steps: checkout, setup Rust toolchain, cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings. Add a CI status badge to README.md that links to the scheduled workflow. Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before committing.

notes: All tasks should be done on feature branches with PRs to main
Run cargo fmt --check, cargo test, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings before every commit
Task 1 (--plan-file) is most practical for CI pipeline integration
Task 2 (filtering) builds on existing parser and is user-facing
Task 6 (CI) is lowest priority since user requested minimal automation
